lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh ubare saachaa naam samaal |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs are saved, by contemplating the True Name. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲਂ‍ੀ ਅਸੀ ਚੰਗੀਆ ਆਚਾਰੀ ਬੁਰੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: galanee asee changeea aachaaree bureeaah |
lines.english: We are good at talking, but our actions are bad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹੁ ਕੁਸੁਧਾ ਕਾਲੀਆ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਚਿਟਵੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: manahu kusudhaa kaaleea baahar chittaveeaah |
lines.english: Mentally, we are impure and black, but outwardly, we appear white.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੀਸਾ ਕਰਿਹ ਤਿਨਾੜੀਆ ਜੋ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਦਰੁ ਖੜੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: reesaa karih tinaarreea jo seveh dar kharreeaah |
lines.english: We imitate those who stand and serve at the Lord's Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਲਿ ਖਸਮੈ ਰਤੀਆ ਮਾਣਹਿ ਸੁਖਿ ਰਲੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: naal khasamai rateea maaneh sukh raleeaah |
lines.english: They are attuned to the Love of their Husband Lord, and they experience the pleasure of His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਦੈ ਤਾਣਿ ਨਿਤਾਣੀਆ ਰਹਹਿ ਨਿਮਾਨਣੀਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: hodai taan nitaaneea raheh nimaananeeaah |
lines.english: They remain powerless, even while they have power; they remain humble and meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਜਲੁ ਮੀਨਾ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੇ ਹੀ ਆਪਿ ਜਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape jal meenaa hai aape aape hee aap jaal |
lines.english: You Yourself are the water, You Yourself are the fish, and You Yourself are the net.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਕਾਰਥਾ ਜੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak janam sakaarathaa je tin kai sang milaah |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, our lives become profitable if we associate with them. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਲੁ ਵਤਾਇਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੇਬਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape jaal vataaeidaa aape vich sebaal |
lines.english: You Yourself cast the net, and You Yourself are the bait.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਕਮਲੁ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਹੈ ਸੈ ਹਥਾ ਵਿਚਿ ਗੁਲਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape kamal alipat hai sai hathaa vich gulaal |
lines.english: You Yourself are the lotus, unaffected and still brightly-colored in hundreds of feet of water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੁਧਹੁ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਹੀ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੇਖਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har tudhahu baahar kichh nahee gurasabadee vekh nihaal |7|
lines.english: O Lord, nothing is beyond You. I am delighted to behold You, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਰਾਇਦਾ ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਘੜੀ ਕਰਿ ਖਿਆਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon aape mukat karaaeidaa ik nimakh gharree kar khiaal |
lines.english: You Yourself liberate those who think of You for even an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਧਨ ਖਸਮੈ ਚਲੈ ਰਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: je dhan khasamai chalai rajaaee |
lines.english: But if the soul-bride follows the Will of her Lord and Master,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਧੋਖਾ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਸੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: andar dhokhaa need na sovai |
lines.english: She is filled with deception, and she cannot sleep in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਬਹੁਤਾ ਰੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hukam na jaanai bahutaa rovai |
lines.english: One who does not know the Hukam of the Lord's Command cries out in terrible pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਮੀ ਇਹ ਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak karamee ih mat paaee |
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Mercy, this understanding is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dar ghar sobhaa mehal bulaaee |
lines.english: She shall be honored in her own home, and called to the Mansion of His Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee sach samaaee |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, she is absorbed into the True One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣਿਆ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਸੁੰਭਾ ਦੇਖਿ ਨ ਭੁਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh naam vihooniaa rang kasunbhaa dekh na bhul |
lines.english: O self-willed manmukh, devoid of the Naam, do not be misled upon beholding the color of the safflower.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸ ਕਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਦਿਨ ਥੋੜਿਆ ਛੋਛਾ ਇਸ ਦਾ ਮੁਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: eis kaa rang din thorriaa chhochhaa is daa mul |
lines.english: Its color lasts for only a few days-it is worthless!

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਲਗੇ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਮੂਰਖ ਅੰਧ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: doojai lage pach mue moorakh andh gavaar |
lines.english: Attached to duality, the foolish, blind and stupid people waste away and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਟਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕੀਟ ਸੇ ਪਇ ਪਚਹਿ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: bisattaa andar keett se pe pacheh vaaro vaar |
lines.english: Like worms, they live in manure, and in it, they die over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਰੰਗੁਲੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate se rangule gur kai sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam are dyed in the color of truth; they take on the intuitive peace and poise of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhagatee rang na utarai sahaje rahai samaae |2|
lines.english: The color of devotional worship does not fade away; they remain intuitively absorbed in the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਵਲੁ ਛਲੁ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਖਾਵਦੇ ਮੁਹਹੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਕੁਸਤੁ ਤਿਨੀ ਢਾਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: eik val chhal kar kai khaavade muhahu koorr kusat tinee dtaahiaa |
lines.english: Some eat and survive by practicing fraud and deceit; from their mouths they drop falsehood and lies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ਸਭ ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸੰਬਾਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sisatt upaaee sabh tudh aape rijak sanbaahiaa |
lines.english: You created the entire universe, and You Yourself bring sustenance to it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨਾ ਸਚੁ ਬੁਝਾਇਓਨੁ ਤਿਨਾ ਅਤੁਟ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਦੇਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eikanaa sach bujhaaeon tinaa atutt bhanddaar devaaeaa |
lines.english: Some understand Truthfulness; they are given the inexhaustible treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਕਰਹਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਓਤੈ ਕੰਮਿ ਓਇ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aape bhaavai so kareh tudh otai kam oe laaeaa |
lines.english: As it pleases You, You assign them their tasks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚੇਤਿ ਖਾਹਿ ਤਿਨਾ ਸਫਲੁ ਹੈ ਅਚੇਤਾ ਹਥ ਤਡਾਇਆ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: har chet khaeh tinaa safal hai achetaa hath taddaaeaa |8|
lines.english: Those who eat by remembering the Lord are prosperous, while those who do not remember Him stretch out their hands in need. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਬੇਦ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਸੁਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: parr parr panddit bed vakhaaneh maaeaa moh suaae |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, constantly read and recite the Vedas, for the sake of the love of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਮਨ ਮੂਰਖ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae har naam visaariaa man moorakh milai sajaae |
lines.english: In the love of duality, the foolish people have forgotten the Lord's Name; they shall receive their punishment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਦਿਤਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਜੋ ਦੇਂਦਾ ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸੰਬਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin jeeo pindd ditaa tis kabahoon na chetai jo dendaa rijak sanbaeh |
lines.english: They never think of the One who gave them body and soul, who provides sustenance to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕਾ ਫਾਹਾ ਗਲਹੁ ਨ ਕਟੀਐ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jam kaa faahaa galahu na katteeai fir fir aavai jaae |
lines.english: The noose of death shall not be cut away from their necks; they shall come and go in reincarnation over and over again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kichhoo na soojhai andhule poorab likhiaa kamaae |
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not understand anything. They do what they are pre-ordained to do.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਮਾਣਹਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪੈਨਣਾ ਸੁਖੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਿਹਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sukh maaneh sukh painanaa sukhe sukh vihaae |
lines.english: They enjoy peace, they wear peace, and they pass their lives in the peace of peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: poorai bhaag satigur milai sukhadaataa naam vasai man aae |
lines.english: Through perfect destiny, they meet the True Guru, the Giver of peace, and the Naam comes to abide in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sev sukh paaeaa sach naam gunataas |
lines.english: Serving the True Guru, peace is obtained. The True Name is the Treasure of Excellence.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਨਾਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਜਿਤੁ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੈ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak so naau manahu na visaareeai jit dar sachai sobhaa paae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, they do not forget the Naam from the mind; they are honored in the Court of the Lord. ||1||
